高考结束，秦风多了个新身份——富二代。
但他发现，自己好像不太会当。
花钱？太难了。炫富？算了吧。

秦风决定低调入学。

报到那天，他遇到两个学姐。
一个热情似火，盯着他的手腕看了又看。
一个冷冷扫了他一眼，转身就走。

后来秦风知道，热情那个，认定他有钱。
冷冷的那个，当时在默默吐槽他的花裤衩。

可那天晚上，秦风喝多了蹲在路边吐。
那个冷冷扫他的女孩走过来，把咬了一半的冰棍递给他。

再后来，她骗他上台唱歌。
秦风五音不全，硬着头皮唱完，成了全校知名笑话。

再再后来，她在手机上问他：“橙汁好喝吗？”
秦风当时正攥着她喝剩的半瓶，看到这条消息，差点没拿稳手机。

后来的后来。

清宁瞥见那条花裤衩，总忍不住吐槽一句：
“你对这裤子还真是情有独钟啊。”

秦风只是笑笑。
他只是在想，因为那幸福开始的地方。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2138e65d2630f70e007cf6fb6cc7b1a8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"有温度的凉白开","author_id":"","book_id":"7515643651326757913","book_name":"刚成了富二代，你又想霸占校花？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7515644120723898905","read_count":"14171","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"198895"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"102","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,神豪,打脸,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2138e65d2630f70e007cf6fb6cc7b1a8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184752&x-signature=dh3b0%2B1ZZhW%2FFoeNQSbYyjgZ%2FM8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3822320967486167","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"131"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201759120E43BE691DA4A1B586CE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18681,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":635},"user_action":{
